tool.name: browser_action
tool.description: Perform browser actions using a Playwright-controlled browser with multiple tabs, including launch, goto, click, type, execute_js, and selector actions like click_selector, fill_selector, wait_for_selector, and query_selector_all. The browser is PERSISTENT and remains active until explicitly closed.

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Required for 'launch', 'goto', and optionally for 'new_tab' actions.

parameter.name: coordinate
parameter.description: Required for 'click', 'double_click', and 'hover' actions. Format: "x,y". Calculate coordinates from the center of elements in the screenshot.

parameter.name: tab_id
parameter.description: Required for 'switch_tab' and 'close_tab' actions. Default: currently active tab.

parameter.name: js_code
parameter.description: Required for 'execute_js' action. JavaScript runs in page context. LAST EVALUATED EXPRESSION is returned (no return statement needed). For objects, wrap in parens: {title: document.title}. For async: await fetch(url).then(r => r.status).

parameter.name: duration
parameter.description: Required for 'wait' action. Number of seconds to pause (can be fractional).

parameter.name: clear
parameter.description: For 'get_console_logs': whether to clear logs after retrieval. Default: False.

parameter.name: selector
parameter.description: Required for selector actions ('click_selector', 'fill_selector', 'wait_for_selector', 'query_selector_all'). CSS selector string (e.g., '#login-btn', 'input[name="username"]', '.submit-form button').

parameter.name: timeout
parameter.description: For selector actions: max seconds to wait for element. Default: 5s for click/fill, 10s for wait_for_selector.

parameter.name: wait_state
parameter.description: For 'wait_for_selector': element state to wait for. Options: 'attached', 'detached', 'visible', 'hidden'. Default: 'visible'.

returns.description: Response containing: screenshot (base64 PNG), url, title, viewport, tab_id, all_tabs, message, js_result, console_logs (50KB max, 200 entries), page_source (100KB max). Selector actions also return: selector_found (bool), selector_used, elements (for query_selector_all).
